items.title: FAQ: Business Screen
items.content: Frequently Asked Questions: Business Screen Business Profile How can I change my company data? Open the Business screen and tap the profile edit button. Change the necessary data and tap Save. Guide Can I have multiple businesses on one account? Yes, but each business requires a separate business profile. If you have branches: use the child businesses system. How do I change the company logo? On the Business screen, tap the camera icon on the avatar. You can take a new photo or choose one from the gallery. --- Sports Facilities How many facilities can I add? There is no limit: you can add any number of sports facilities. How do I change the facility price? Open the facility edit form, change the net or gross price (the system will automatically calculate the other value), and save. Guide Can I temporarily close a facility? Yes: set the schedule for a specific date without any selected hours. How to configure a schedule --- Payments and Invoicing Is TPay required? items.title: Agent Management
items.content: Agent Management Description Agents are people with access to manage your business in Spotto. They can view bookings, manage facilities, and handle customers on your behalf. The system allows you to invite new agents by email, track invitation statuses, and revoke access when needed. How the Invitation System Works The entire process of adding an agent consists of four stages: 1. Invitation: you enter the email address of the person you want to invite and send the invitation 2. Pending: the invitation appears on the "Pending Invitations" list. An email with an acceptance link is sent to the provided address 3. Acceptance: the person clicks the link in the email and becomes an agent of your business 4. Expiration: if the invitation is not accepted within a specified time, it expires automatically !Agent section: Screenshot #56 > 💡 Tip: You can send invitations to multiple people: each will receive a separate email. items.title: Child Businesses
items.content: Child Businesses Description The child business system enables managing an organizational structure with a parent company and branches. A child business can use the parent company's payment configuration (TPay) and tax data (NIP), which simplifies managing multiple locations. When to Use Child Businesses Child businesses are useful when: - You have multiple locations (e.g., a gym chain) and want to manage them centrally - You want branches to use a single TPay account: no need to configure payments separately for each one - You want to issue invoices under one NIP for the entire organization How the Association Works ` Parent company (parent) ├── Child business A (Krakow branch) ├── Child business B (Warsaw branch) └── Child business C (Wroclaw branch) ` 1. Child business sends an association request to the parent company 2. Parent company accepts or rejects the request 3. After acceptance, the parent company configures permissions for the branch Permissions The parent company can gran

items.title: KSeF Integration
items.content: KSeF Integration Description KSeF (National e-Invoice System) is an electronic invoicing system operated by the Ministry of Finance. The integration allows you to automatically issue and send e-invoices directly from the Spotto app. The system supports two authorization methods: token and qualified certificate. items.title: TPay Integration
items.content: TPay Integration Description TPay is a certified payment gateway that enables accepting online payments from customers. TPay configuration is required for customers to be able to pay for sports facility bookings and products (passes, packages) in the Spotto app. Why TPay Is Important Without TPay configured: - Customers cannot pay for bookings in the app - Your products will not be available for purchase in the Shop - Trainers cannot collect fees for training sessions Required Data TPay configuration requires providing company registration data: | Field | Format | Description | |-------|--------|-------------| | NIP | 10 digits | Company tax identification number | | Email | address@company.pl | Company contact email | | Phone | phone number | Company contact phone number | | REGON | 9 or 14 digits | REGON number from the GUS registry | | KRS | 10 digits | National Court Register number | | Legal form | from dropdown list | Legal entity type (e.g., LLC, joint-stock company, sole propri

items.title: Trainer Associations
items.content: Trainer Associations Description The trainer association system allows you to manage collaboration with trainers who conduct sessions at your sports facilities. You can accept or reject trainer requests, set hourly rates, grant permissions, and control what trainers can do at your facilities. How Collaboration Works 1. The trainer searches for your business in the app and sends a collaboration request 2. You receive the request in the "Trainers" section on the Business screen 3. You configure the rate and permissions before accepting 4. You accept: the trainer can conduct sessions at your facilities Association Statuses | Status | Color | Description | |--------|-------|-------------| | Pending | Yellow/orange | Trainer sent a request: waiting for your decision | | Confirmed | Green | Collaboration active: trainer conducts sessions | | Rejected | Red | Request rejected | !Trainer associations list: Screenshot #59 Hourly Rates For each trainer, you set an individual hourly rate: | Field

items.title: FAQ : Home Screen
items.content: Frequently Asked Questions : Home Screen Searching for facilities How can I find a sports facility near me? You have two options: 1. Search bar : type the name of a city in the search bar at the top of the Home screen and select a date. Step-by-step guide 2. Map : open the map view, which will automatically show facilities near your location. How to use the map Can I search for facilities in another city? Yes. Type any city in the search field : the app does not restrict results to your current location. Why is the search bar not showing any results? !No search results screen Most common causes: - City name spelled incorrectly : check the spelling - No facilities registered in Spotto in that city - A too-narrow facility type filter selected : remove the filter and try again - No internet connection --- Sport categories What sport categories are available? items.title: Favorites system
items.content: Favorites system Description The favorites system allows you to save sports facilities that you regularly visit. Saved facilities are displayed as cards in the Favorites section on the Home screen. How to add to favorites You can add a facility to favorites in two ways: 1. From search results: tap the heart icon (♡) on the facility card 2. From the details page: tap the heart icon in the upper right corner Once added, the icon changes to a filled heart (♥). Favorites section on the Home screen The section appears on the Home screen after adding at least one facility. It contains: - Facility cards: mini cards with the name, address, and rating - Book button: quick booking without opening the details - Scrolling: if you have many favorites, scroll the list horizontally Managing favorites - Removing: tap the filled heart icon (♥) to remove a facility from favorites - Order: facilities are displayed in the order they were added (newest first) - Sync: favorites are linked to your account an

It is the quickest way to find the nearest facility and book it. --- Before You Start - Make sure the app has access to your location (GPS) - Check that location is enabled in your phone's settings --- Steps Step 1: Open the Map View On the Home screen, find the Nearby Facilities section with the map. items.title: Cancellation and Refund Policy
items.content: Cancellation and Refund Policy Description Spotto allows reservation cancellation with a refund, provided certain rules are met. Below you will find complete information about the cancellation policy. Cancellation Rules 48-Hour Rule A reservation can be canceled no later than 48 hours before the scheduled visit date. | Time until reservation | Can it be canceled? | |------------------------|---------------------| | > 48 hours | Yes | | 24-48 hours | No | | < 24 hours | No | | Today | No | | Past | No | Who Can Cancel - Only the person who made the reservation can cancel it - Reservations paid with a pass or voucher cannot be canceled - Cancellation applies to reservations with status: Confirmed, Pending, Active, Partial Cancellation Fee A fee is charged for each cancellation (full or partial): | Element | Value | |---------|-------| | Fee | 5% of the canceled portion's value | | Refund | 95% of the canceled portion's value | Example: Canceling a 200 PLN reservation - Fee: 10 PLN (5%) -

items.content: How to cancel a reservation Screen: Reservations Role: User Difficulty: Easy Overview If your plans change, you can cancel an entire reservation and receive a refund. Cancellation is available for reservations with a future date, subject to the 48-hour rule. --- Before You Start - The reservation must have a future date (not today and not in the past) - There must be more than 48 hours until the reservation starts - The reservation must not be paid with a voucher/pass - Reservation status must be: confirmed, pending, active, or partially canceled --- Steps Step 1: Open reservation details On the Reservations screen, tap the card of the reservation you want to cancel. !IMGRES006 : Tap the reservation card Step 2: Tap "Cancel All" In the details view, scroll down to the actions section. items.title: FAQ: Shop Screen
items.content: Frequently Asked Questions: Shop Screen Purchasing What is a product in the Spotto Shop? A product is a pass, entry package, or subscription offered by a sports facility. When you buy a product, you receive a specific number of entries that you can use within a given time period. What types of products are available? Products vary by validity period: - Daily/weekly: short-term packages - Monthly: the most popular passes - Annual: long-term subscriptions - Lifetime: unlimited-duration passes Can I buy a product for someone else? No: products are linked to your account. However, you can share a product link so another person can buy it for themselves. --- Payments What payment methods are available? Payments are handled by the TPay system. Available methods include: - Credit/debit card (Visa, Mastercard) - Instant bank transfer - BLIK Is my payment information secure? Yes. Payments are processed by the certified TPay gateway. Spotto does not store your card details: all data goes directl

items.title: FAQ: Trainer Screen
items.content: Frequently Asked Questions: Trainer Screen Trainer Profile What is the difference between an independent trainer and an employee? An independent trainer runs their own business: they must provide a tax ID (NIP), business details, and configure TPay. They can create trainings on their own. A trainer-employee works for a sports facility: they need fewer details, but cannot create trainings on their own. Sessions are created for them by the business. Can I change my type from employee to independent? Yes: edit your trainer profile and change the type. You will need to fill in the additional data required for independent trainers. How do I change my hourly rate? Edit your trainer profile and update the net or gross rate. The system will automatically calculate the other value. Note that a business may set its own rate for you independently of yours. --- Business Partnerships How can I start conducting sessions at a facility? 1. Create a trainer profile 2. items.title: Availability Schedule
items.content: Availability Schedule Description The schedule allows a trainer to specify the hours they are available for conducting sessions. Businesses can check your availability before scheduling a session. The schedule is visible to businesses with which you have a confirmed association. Schedule Types General Schedule (Weekly) A recurring schedule for each week. You define it once, and it applies until changed. | Day | Hour Range | Notes | |-----|-----------|-------| | Monday through Friday | 00:00 - 23:00 | Each day configured separately | | Saturday | 00:00 - 23:00 | Separate configuration | | Sunday | 00:00 - 23:00 | Separate configuration | Each hour (hourly slot) can be marked as: - Available: ready for sessions during this time - Unavailable: cannot conduct sessions To set availability, tap the appropriate slots on the weekly grid. Slots change color depending on the status. Specific Date Schedule An override of the general schedule for a selected date. Useful when: - You have a day off

items.title: App Crashes
items.content: App Crashes Problem The Spotto app closes unexpectedly, becomes unresponsive, or displays a blank screen. Solutions Step 1: Restart the app Close the Spotto app (force close) and reopen it. Android: Multitask button → swipe Spotto up iPhone: Swipe up from the bottom to the middle of the screen → swipe Spotto up Step 2: Update the app Make sure you have the latest version: - Android: Google Play Store → Spotto → Update - iPhone: App Store → Spotto → Update Step 3: Restart your phone Turn your phone off and on again. This resolves memory issues. Step 4: Clear cache (Android) 1. Settings → Apps → Spotto 2. Storage → Clear cache Step 5: Reinstall If the problem persists: 1. Uninstall the app 2. Reinstall from the store 3. Log in with your credentials > 💡 Tip: Your data (bookings, purchases, profile) is linked to your account, not the app : you won't lose it after reinstalling. --- Reporting Bugs If you enabled Crash Reports in privacy settings, the app will automatically send a crash repo

items.title: Slow App Performance
items.content: Slow App Performance Problem The Spotto app runs slowly : screens take a long time to load, buttons respond with a delay. Solutions Check your internet connection Slow connection = slow app. Check: - Wi-Fi signal strength - Mobile data coverage - Try switching between Wi-Fi and mobile data Close unnecessary apps Other apps running in the background can use up memory and slow down Spotto. Close unnecessary apps. Restart your phone Restarting your phone frees up memory and can significantly improve performance. Update the app Newer versions may contain performance improvements: - Android: Google Play Store → Spotto → Update - iPhone: App Store → Spotto → Update Check phone storage Lack of free space on your phone can slow down all apps. Free up at least 500 MB of space. --- Related Topics - App crashes - Sync issues

items.title: Sync Issues
items.content: Sync Issues Problem Data in the app is not updating : e.g., after purchasing a product you don't see it in "My Purchases", a booking doesn't appear, or profile changes are not saved. Solutions Refresh the screen Swipe down from the top of the list (pull-to-refresh) to force a data refresh. Switch between tabs Go to a different tab and come back : this forces the data to reload. Close and reopen the app Close the app completely (force close) and reopen it. Check your internet connection An unstable internet connection prevents synchronization. Check: - Wi-Fi or mobile data connection - Try opening a website in your browser Log out and log back in As a last resort: 1. Open Settings → Log out 2. Log back in with your credentials 3. Data should reload fresh --- Push Notifications If you're not receiving notifications about purchases and bookings: 1. Check that push notifications are enabled in privacy settings 2. Check your phone's system settings : make sure Spotto has permission to send

items.title: Account Locked
items.content: Account Locked Problem Your account has been temporarily or permanently locked and you cannot log in. Most Common Causes Too many failed login attempts Solution: 1. Wait 15-30 minutes 2. Try logging in again 3. If you don't remember your password : reset it Security lock If the system detected suspicious activity on your account: 1. Check your email inbox : you should have received a notification 2. If it wasn't you trying to log in : change your password immediately 3. Contact support@spotto.pl to unlock your account --- Contact Support If you cannot unlock your account on your own: - Email: support@spotto.pl - Provide your account email address and a description of the problem --- Related Topics - I can't log in - I forgot my password

items.title: I Forgot My Password
items.content: I Forgot My Password Problem You don't remember your Spotto account password. Solution Step 1: Open the login screen Launch the Spotto app. On the login screen, tap Forgot password. Step 2: Enter your email address Type the email address associated with your account and tap Send link. Step 3: Check your inbox A password reset link will be sent to your email address. Check: - Your inbox - Spam / Junk folder Step 4: Set a new password Open the link from the email and set a new password. Step 5: Log in Return to the app and log in with your new password. --- Troubleshooting Email doesn't arrive - Check your Spam folder - Make sure you entered the correct email address - Wait a few minutes and try again - Check if an account with that email exists Link expired - Reset links have a limited validity period - Generate a new link by repeating the steps from the beginning --- Related Topics - I can't log in - Account locked

items.title: I Can't Log In
items.content: I Can't Log In Problem You cannot log in to the Spotto app : you see an error or the login screen doesn't accept your credentials. Most Common Causes and Solutions Wrong password Symptoms: Message "Invalid email or password" Solution: 1. Check that Caps Lock is not enabled 2. Make sure you are entering the correct email address 3. If you don't remember your password : reset it Account doesn't exist Symptoms: Message about a non-existent account Solution: 1. Check if the registration was completed 2. Make sure you are using the same email address as during registration 3. If the account doesn't exist, register again No internet connection Symptoms: Loading never finishes, timeout Solution: 1. Check Wi-Fi or mobile data connection 2. Open a browser and check if other websites work 3. Switch between Wi-Fi and mobile data Too many failed attempts Symptoms: Message about temporary lock Solution: 1. Wait a few minutes and try again 2. If the problem persists : reset your password --- Next St

items.title: Booking Failed
items.content: Booking Failed Problem You are trying to book a sports facility, but the booking ends with an error. Most Common Causes and Solutions Time slot already taken Symptoms: Message about slot unavailability Solution: The selected slot was booked by another user. Choose a different time or day. Payment issue Symptoms: Booking is not confirmed after payment Solution: See Payment failed No internet connection Solution: Check your connection and try again. Facility not accepting bookings Symptoms: No available slots Solution: 1. Check the facility's schedule : it may be closed on the selected date 2. Try a different day 3. Contact the facility directly --- Pending Payments If the payment was interrupted, the booking will go to the Pending Payments section on the Home screen. You can complete the payment from there. --- Related Topics - Time slot unavailable - Payment failed - How to book a facility

items.title: I Can't Cancel a Booking
items.content: I Can't Cancel a Booking Problem You want to cancel a booking, but the option is not available or an error is displayed. Most Common Causes Too late to cancel Symptoms: The "Cancel" button is inactive or a message is displayed Explanation: Many facilities do not allow cancellation less than 48 hours before the booking time. Solution: Contact the sports facility directly : you can find the contact details in the booking details. Booking has already started Explanation: You cannot cancel a booking that is already in progress or has already taken place. Technical issues Solution: 1. Check your internet connection 2. Close and reopen the app 3. Try again --- Cancellation Policy | Time until booking | Refund | |-------------------|--------| | More than 48 hours | Full refund minus 10% processing fee | | Less than 48 hours | Depends on the facility's policy | | After the booking time | No refund | > ⚠️ Important: Specific cancellation policies may vary depending on the sports facility. --- R

items.title: Time Slot Unavailable
items.content: Time Slot Unavailable Problem You want to book a facility, but the selected time slot is unavailable or grayed out. Most Common Causes Time slot taken by another user Someone booked this slot before you. Solution: Choose a different time on the same day or check availability on another day. Facility closed at the selected time The facility owner may have closed the facility for that day (holiday, maintenance break, etc.). Solution: Check a different day. Opening hours may vary on weekends and holidays. Minimum booking length Some facilities require a minimum booking of 2 slots (2 hours). Solution: Select the required minimum number of slots. --- Tips - Gray slots = taken or unavailable - Green slots = available for booking - Check several days to find an available slot - Peak hours (6:00 PM - 9:00 PM) get booked the fastest --- Related Topics - Booking failed - How to book a facility

items.title: Payment Failed
items.content: Payment Failed Problem You are trying to pay for a booking or product, but the payment ends with an error. Most Common Causes and Solutions Insufficient funds Symptoms: TPay rejects the transaction Solution: Check your bank account balance and try again or use a different payment method. Payment card error Symptoms: Message about card rejection Solution: 1. Check that the card details are correct 2. Make sure the card has not expired 3. Check if you have reached your transaction limit 4. Contact your bank if the problem persists BLIK issue Symptoms: BLIK code is not accepted Solution: 1. Make sure the code is current (BLIK is valid for 2 minutes) 2. Generate a new code in your banking app 3. Check if you have BLIK payments enabled at your bank Redirect to TPay not working Symptoms: Browser does not open the TPay page Solution: 1. Check your internet connection 2. Close other apps in the background 3. Update the Spotto app 4. Try again Timeout / time expired Symptoms: Payment session ex

items.title: Refund Issues
items.content: Refund Issues Problem You are expecting a refund for a canceled booking or product, but the funds have not returned to your account. Refund Policy Bookings - Canceling a booking more than 48 hours in advance : full refund minus processing fee (10%) - Canceling less than 48 hours before the booking : refund may not apply (depends on the facility's policy) - Details can be found in the sports facility's terms and conditions Products (passes) - Refund policies are set individually by each sports facility - Contact the business directly Waiting Time | Payment method | Refund time | |---------------|-------------| | Payment card | 3-10 business days | | Bank transfer | 1-5 business days | | BLIK | 1-3 business days | What To Do 1. Check the booking status : make sure the cancellation was confirmed 2. Wait : refunds can take up to 10 business days 3. Check your bank statement : the refund may appear under a different date 4. items.title: TPay Errors
items.content: TPay Errors Problem During payment via TPay, you see an error, the page doesn't load, or the redirect doesn't work. Most Common Errors TPay page doesn't load Solution: 1. Check your internet connection 2. Close the browser and try again 3. Clear your browser cache "Session expired" on the TPay page Solution: 1. Return to the Spotto app 2. Start the payment from the beginning 3. Try to complete the payment within a few minutes Error after successful payment Symptoms: TPay confirms the payment, but the app doesn't update the status Solution: 1. Wait a few seconds : the app verifies the payment in the background 2. Close and reopen the app 3. Check the "My Purchases" or "Bookings" tab 4. If the product/booking doesn't appear after a few minutes : contact support@spotto.pl Redirect from TPay doesn't return to the app Solution: 1. Manually open the Spotto app 2. Check if the booking or product was registered 3. If not : wait a few minutes and refresh --- Information for Support If you conta
